creator: riggs@rrr.de
text:
On Wed, Jan 28, 2009 at 23:22, Stefan Walter <stefan@freebsd.org> wrote:

> there hasn't been any followup to this since November. Can you let me know
> what the state of this is?

Well, I can only say that I have built mplayer the last time about 3
weeks ago, and there was no SSL/libsmbclient link problem. It was
simply working alright.
However, if this problem is reproducible on other machines than VVD's,
then we certainly should patch the configure script accordingly. But
please not as "patch-zz", but as an updated revision of patch-ad.

Riggs
